entries.round: task:The user specifically requested a 'spec.md' file instead of 'docs/ARCHITECTURE.md'. When the debate finishes, you MUST synthesize the final B2B AI SaaS Converter architecture into 'spec.md' (at the project root) and the step-by-step implementation plan into 'tasks.md' (also at the root). Use the exact <write_file path="spec.md">content</write_file> syntax for both files to overwrite them with the new debated architecture.
